lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: Good day, how may I help you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to buy more bank slots.

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: I can sell you up to [number] additional bank slots in sets of 40. How many are you interested in buying?

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: Buying [number] additional bank slots will cost [number] coins. Be warned, this purchase is not reversible. Are you happy to proceed?

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: Your additional bank slots have been added.

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: This is a branch of the Bank of Gielinor. We have branches in many towns.

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: We will look after your items and money for you. Leave your valuables with us if you want to keep them safe.

sections.title: Knocking on the locked door in Varrock west bank

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't think I'm ever going to be allowed in there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm [player name]. Please let me in.

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: No. Staff only beyond this point. You can't come in here.

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: What? I'm not... oh, just go away!

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: Stop messing about and go away!

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: Doctor wh.. hang on, I'm not falling for that one again! Go away.
